domain: Igbo umunna kindred governance (Nigerian patrilineage tradition, pre-colonial direct democracy): kindred = patrilineal extended family from founding ancestor; eldest male okpara presides over kindred assembly; multiple kindreds in village; spokesperson at village council; intra-kindred dense direct-democracy discussion; inter-kindred deliberation through spokespeople; umuada (kindred-daughters) complementary gender-balanced track; legislative + judicial body for community
specific_mechanism: UMUNNA-KINDRED-SPOKESPERSON-2-TIER: 2-tier hierarchical multi-agent LLM with cluster-spokesperson + umuada complementary track. (1) K kindred clusters {Cluster_1, ..., Cluster_K} of M_k LLM agents each (distinct training-subset + persona per cluster). (2) Intra-kindred dense communication: within each Cluster_k, all M_k agents communicate freely (full-mesh) to converge on cluster position p_k via internal consensus. (3) Okpara spokesperson selection: each cluster elects okpara o_k = arg max over members by agreement-score (alignment with cluster mean). (4) Inter-kindred council (low-bandwidth): only K spokespeople {o_1, ..., o_K} communicate at the upper tier; final decision = weighted-majority over {p_1, ..., p_K} with weights w_k = M_k / total_M (kindred-size weighted). (5) Decision propagation: outcome cascades back to kindred members via okpara broadcast. (6) Umuada complementary parallel-track: K kindred-daughters cluster (separate persona class) provides parallel evaluation; final decision = lambda * umunna_consensus + (1 - lambda) * umuada_consensus. (7) Differs from R443 ALUNA-COUNCIL (4-tier council, no spokesperson + no umuada complementary track) and R488 MAQAM-LEAD-TARJAMAH (solo+ensemble, no 2-tier cluster + no kindred-size weighting) by 2-tier kindred-cluster + okpara agreement-selection spokesperson + low-bandwidth inter-kindred council + kindred-size-weighted vote + umuada gender-balanced parallel evaluation track.
llm_application: UMUNNA-KINDRED-SPOKESPERSON-2-TIER K-cluster intra-dense full-mesh communication + okpara spokesperson selection by agreement-score + inter-kindred low-bandwidth K-spokesperson council + kindred-size M_k weighted-majority vote + umuada complementary parallel-track gender-balanced lambda-blend final. Differs from R392 MAASAI-ILPAYIANI age-grade. R403 WELSH-PENILLION. R411 IROQUOIS-CONDOLENCE. R443 ALUNA-COUNCIL (closest — 4-tier, no umuada-complementary + no kindred-size weight). R449 MAPUCHE-PURRUN. R463 HOKULEA-CREW. R465 SALGAN. R488 MAQAM-LEAD-TARJAMAH-DIALOGUE (closest — solo+ensemble, no K-cluster mesh + no okpara + no umuada). R500 QULLIQ-HEARTH-FLAMEKEEPER (hearth-anchor + voice-rotation, no K-cluster + no spokesperson). Differs from TalkHier 2502.11098 + Hierarchical Multi-Agent Taxonomy 2508.12683 + AgentNet++ 2512.00614 + Multi-Agent Collaboration Survey 2501.06322 by 2-tier kindred-spokesperson + umuada complementary parallel-track + kindred-size weighted-vote combination. Differs by 2-TIER KINDRED-CLUSTER + OKPARA SPOKESPERSON + KINDRED-SIZE WEIGHTED-VOTE + UMUADA COMPLEMENTARY.
novelty_claim: TalkHier + Hierarchical Multi-Agent Taxonomy + AgentNet++ + Multi-Agent Collaboration Survey cover hierarchical multi-agent + cluster-head + voting space. UMUNNA-KINDRED-SPOKESPERSON-2-TIER adds (a) explicit 2-tier kindred-cluster + (b) okpara spokesperson by agreement-score + (c) inter-kindred low-bandwidth council with kindred-size weighting + (d) umuada complementary parallel-track gender-balanced lambda-blend. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: K-kindred LLM cluster intra-dense communication mesh
okpara spokesperson agreement-score selection per cluster
inter-kindred low-bandwidth council K-spokesperson weighted vote
